overall.description: A foggy morning at a historical harbor dock in a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2). The camera follows a character running along wooden piers past steamboats, cargo crates, and workers in a desaturated, atmospheric setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy harbor pier with moored steamships

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the wooden pier

agents.ego_description: running along the wooden pier observing the foggy harbor with large steamboats moored in the water

sailing ship with masts visible through the morning fog
weathered wooden dock planks extending along the waterfront
simple wooden fence lining the edge of the pier

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy harbor with a large steamboat and sailing vessel visible through the mist. The camera moves along a wooden pier, passing cargo crates, as the character transitions from walking to running.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier edge overlooking water with industrial dock buildings

events.description: camera pans up from the water surface to reveal dock warehouses and industrial structures in the distance

agents.ego_description: pausing to look down at the water then panning right to view the dock warehouses and industrial structures

entered.detail: large wooden industrial building with gabled roof on the dock
tall wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The camera looks down at the rippling water from the pier edge, then pans right to reveal industrial dock warehouses through the fog. The wooden railing shifts from right to left as the view turns toward the dock buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock walkway with cargo storage and telegraph poles

events.description: entering a section with scattered workers and stacked cargo barrels

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the wooden dock toward the industrial warehouse district

entered.detail: stacks of wooden barrels secured with rope along the dock edge

segments.scene_description: The character runs along the wooden dock, passing stacks of cargo barrels and telegraph poles. A worker sits resting on barrels to the left as the dock warehouses loom ahead through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy industrial dock with workers, cargo, and horse-drawn carriages

events.description: crowd density increases significantly with many workers and dock laborers visible
passing a horse-drawn carriage parked on the right side of the dock

agents.ego_description: running through the busy dock area weaving between workers, cargo piles, and carriages

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage parked on the side of the dock with yellow cargo
worker leaning against cargo crates watching the character pass

entered.detail: wooden horse-drawn wagon with large wheels and covered cargo
large weathered wooden storage building with open loading areas

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a bustling industrial dock crowded with workers, cargo barrels, and horse-drawn carriages. The area is dense with activity as laborers move about the wooden warehouses and telegraph poles line the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty harbor that transitions from a quiet, foggy pier into a bustling industrial dock. It begins by gliding past a large steamboat and sailing vessel shrouded in mist, moving along a wooden pier past cargo crates as the character accelerates into a run. As the camera glances down at the rippling water, it pans right to reveal industrial warehouses emerging from the fog, with the wooden railing shifting across the frame. The scene then opens up as the character sprints past stacks of barrels and telegraph poles, passing a resting worker before the dock buildings loom closer. Finally, the path expands into a dense industrial hub crowded with laborers and horse-drawn carriages moving between the wooden warehouses.
